attributes.additional_details:
A General Election represents the democratic mechanism by which the public can express its will and guide the nation's future on a more favorable path. 


Therefore, our call to the House of Commons is simple yet resolute: listen to the resounding demand from your constituents. We have lost confidence in the current trajectory and ask for an early General Election to restore faith in our democracy and ensure the United Kingdom is governed effectively and responsibly.
attributes.background: The British public of the four nations are deeply concerned about the current state of governance in our beloved country.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Call a General Election
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/700143
